basic_details.job_title: IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay) Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website https://www.iitb.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Educational qualifications and experience as prescribed in the original advertisement.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bombay to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Bombay Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bombay to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) recruitment is 19th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) post at IIT Bombay as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a graduate degree. Specific educational qualifications and experience are detailed in the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) position?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) position are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. Please refer to the official notification for comprehensive salary information.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not provided in the extracted data. Candidates should consult the official notification for information regarding age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) role?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not specified in the extracted information. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for information on the selection methodology.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the IIT Bombay Junior Trained Graduate Teacher (Marathi) recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 03rd July 2026 and ends on 19th July 2026. Ensure you complete your application within this period.
